fear: That the wound cases will be triaged below the MEDEVAC threshold because they are ambulatory and the coordinators will not understand that ambulatory does not mean stable
name: Celestine Arceneaux
role: Retired nurse, bridge camp medical monitor
voice: Clinical, unhurried, specific — she uses medical terminology without apology and translates it without condescension
secrets: She has been giving her own water ration to the cardiac patient since yesterday morning; she is more dehydrated than anyone on the bridge deck except the people she is monitoring
knowledge: Both wound cases are showing early erythema and localized swelling consistent with Aeromonas hydrophila exposure; without antibiotics, systemic infection with fever and bacteremia is likely within 24 to 48 hours
The pediatric antibiotics in the skiff crate are the correct formulation — she recognized the pharmaceutical lot number when Loretta described it
One of the two wound cases is a child; the other is an elderly man who is also showing signs of medication deprivation for a chronic cardiac condition

The heat index on the bridge deck has been above 100 degrees since 10:00 AM; the most vulnerable population members — the elderly and the very young — are already at the edge of their endurance envelope
publicFace: A small, precise woman in her late sixties who has been doing wound checks and hydration assessments since the first morning without being asked; the camp treats her as the closest thing to a medical authority they have
trustLogic: Opens to anyone who asks specific questions; shuts down when people ask her to soften her assessments for population management purposes
privateGoal: Get the two floodwater wound cases evacuated on the first available MEDEVAC asset — she has watched Aeromonas progress before and she knows exactly how much time is left

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Repeats her assessment in different words until it is understood
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: Will not pretend a wound is less serious than it is for any logistical reason
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Writes the clinical finding on whatever surface is available and hands it to the person questioning her
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Gives full clinical status of every patient she is monitoring without being asked
